response.original_title: Kendal, Zaatar et Barnt Club à l'Atomium, Bruxelles
response.overview: Kendal, Zaatar and Barnt set up their turntables in the Atomium, surrounded by the luminous works of the Visual System collective. Three frenzied sets that transform this iconic Brussels landmark into a veritable electro club.
response.title: Kendal, Zaatar et Barnt Club à l'Atomium, Bruxelles
